scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm db:up && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed
scripts.docker:db:migrate: docker compose run --rm app pnpm --filter @daymark/db db:migrate
scripts.docker:db:seed: docker compose run --rm app pnpm --filter @daymark/db db:seed
scripts.docker:setup: docker compose up -d postgres && docker compose run --rm app pnpm --filter @daymark/db db:migrate && docker compose run --rm app pnpm --filter @daymark/db db:seed
